- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated

## Stop Conditions

- Stop and ask user if PRD scope changes.
- Stop and update spec first if implementation needs a different interface.
- Stop after 3 failed attempts at the same compile/test error and summarize evidence.
